context: Evaluates correct implementation of MQL4/MQL5 version detection from file path information. The candidate must handle file extensions, folder path markers, and the correct defaulting behavior.

checklist.name: .mq4 extension detection
checklist.description: Returns 'mql4' when fileName ends with .mq4 regardless of folder path

checklist.name: .mq5 extension detection
checklist.description: Returns 'mql5' when fileName ends with .mq5 regardless of folder path

checklist.name: Extension priority over folder
checklist.description: File extension takes priority over folder path; a .mq5 file in an MQL4 folder returns 'mql5'

checklist.name: Folder path marker detection
checklist.description: When no file extension is determinative, checks folder path for case-insensitive 'MQL4' or 'MQL5' substring

checklist.name: Null/default behavior
checklist.description: Returns null when both folderPath and fileName are absent; returns 'mql5' (not null) when path is present but version is ambiguous
